# revenuecat_webhook (Resource)

A RevenueCat webhook integration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "revenuecat_webhook" "subscription_events" {
  project_id           = var.revenuecat_project_id
  name                 = "PresencePath subscription events"
  url                  = "https://api.example.com/v1/webhooks/revenuecat"
  authorization_header = var.revenuecat_webhook_authorization_header
  environment          = "production"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Webhook display name.
- `project_id` (String) RevenueCat project ID.
- `url` (String) HTTPS endpoint that receives RevenueCat events.

### Optional

- `app_id` (String) Optional RevenueCat app ID scope.
- `authorization_header` (String, Sensitive) Optional Authorization header sent with webhook requests.
- `environment` (String) Optional `production` or `sandbox` event filter.
- `event_types` (Set of String) Optional set of RevenueCat webhook event types.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (Number) Creation time in milliseconds since Unix epoch.
- `id` (String) RevenueCat webhook integration ID.
- `signing_secret` (String, Sensitive) RevenueCat webhook signing secret.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import revenuecat_webhook.subscription_events proj_example/wh_example
```
